---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve CAUCNet Traffic
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description / Bug 描述

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
请清晰简洁地描述这个 bug。

## Steps to Reproduce / 复现步骤

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior / 期望行为

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
描述你期望发生的行为。

## Actual Behavior / 实际行为

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.
描述实际发生的行为。

## Screenshots / 截图

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.
如果适用，请添加截图帮助说明问题。

## Environment / 环境信息

- **Browser / 浏览器**: [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Edge 120]
- **OS / 操作系统**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Node.js version / Node.js 版本**: [e.g., 18.19.0]
- **Screen resolution / 屏幕分辨率**: [e.g., 1920x1080]
- **Dark mode / 是否使用深色模式**: [Yes/No]

## Additional Context / 补充信息

Add any other context about the problem here.
添加关于问题的其他上下文信息。
